name: browser-search-mcp
description: Search the web using a real browser - enables any LLM to search Google, Bing, Baidu.

interface.shortDescription: Real browser web search for any LLM
interface.longDescription: Search the web using a real browser. Supports Google, Bing, Baidu, DuckDuckGo. Built on browser-takeover-bridge architecture.
defaultPrompt: Search the web for latest information.
